description_long: This is a standard 330ml Pepsi Max can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The exterior is predominantly black with the iconic Pepsi logo—a red, white, and blue sphere—prominently displayed on the front. The can is covered with detailed nutritional information, branding, and product details in white and red text. The top of the can is metallic silver with a typical pull-tab opening mechanism. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light in a way characteristic of aluminum beverage cans. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear, and the can appears unopened.
description: A glossy black Pepsi Max aluminum can with a silver pull-tab top, detailed branding, and nutritional information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large Pepsi logo, 'pepsi MAX' branding, and the phrase 'maximum taste no sugar' in white and red.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional information and ingredients in small white text, with the logo partially visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with more product information, barcode, and smaller Pepsi logo near the top.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the can's volume (330ml), additional branding, and a partial view of the logo.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large Pepsi logo (red, white, blue sphere) on the front, 'pepsi MAX' in white and red, 'maximum taste no sugar' in white, detailed nutritional and product information in white text, barcode, and smaller logos on the sides.
